rationale: Educ. Code §8.121 governs commissioner distribution of FSP funds to regional education service centers. It does not reference homestead exemptions or property tax appraisals. Any indirect budgetary pressure is downstream of FSP appropriations, not a direct conflict.
quote: Regional education service centers receive state financial support for services provided under Section 8.051 from money appropriated for the Foundation School Program.
_note: No direct textual conflict. Indirect fiscal linkage through FSP funding is speculative and outside the operative text of §8.121.
